description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines two stages named "validate yaml syntax" and "network validation with behave". Add a lint job in the "validate yaml syntax" stage that executes the command `bash linter.sh`. Add a behave job in the "network validation with behave" stage that executes the command `bash .behave.sh`. The pipeline does not specify a Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or any conditional rules.
